certification.decision: FLOW-34 has a repaired and verified adapter-package aggregate surface, Docker/Vault auth evidence, and server TypeScript evidence. Full flow mobility certification is withheld because the canonical flow source directory is absent and no three-tenant fork cascade was run for this flow in this round.
basis: FLOW-34 adapter/BFA Jest passed 24 suites and 603 tests after repairing the Framer adapter contract.

openIssues.summary: Create server/src/engine/flows/marketplace-plugin-adapter or explicitly reclassify FLOW-34 as adapter-package-only in the protocol.
Three-tenant marketplace fork cascade with real repos, green GitHub Actions, local registry readbacks, and repo screenshots has not been run for FLOW-34 in this round.
